<img src="https://r2cdn.perplexity.ai/pplx-full-logo-primary-dark%402x.png" style="height:64px;margin-right:32px"/>

# CRITICAL REVISION of the Intelligence Dashboard mockup. The previous version had wrong menu, too few controls, and disconnected data. Generate a COMPLETE full-page high-fidelity UI mockup IMAGE (1920x1080, dark theme \#0a0e17, cyan accents).

CORRECT LEFT SIDEBAR MENU (from our actual codebase, grouped with section headers):
COMMAND section:

- Intelligence Dashboard (highlighted/active)
- Agent Command Center
INTELLIGENCE section:
- Signal Intelligence
- Sentiment Intelligence
- Data Sources Monitor
ML \& ANALYSIS section:
- ML Brain \& Flywheel
- Screener \& Patterns
- Backtesting Lab
- Performance Analytics
- Market Regime
EXECUTION section:
- Active Trades
- Risk Intelligence
- Trade Execution
SYSTEM section:
- Settings

REMOVE: Order Book (not needed). REMOVE generic placeholder data.

TOP KPI STRIP (profit-focused, each with sparkline + dropdown controls):
Portfolio \$847,293 (+12.4%) | Today P\&L +\$3,847 | Unrealized +\$2,100 | Win Rate 68.7% | Sharpe 2.14 | Profit Factor 2.84 | Expected Value +\$127/trade | Kelly Optimal 18.3% | Active Signals 23 | Agent Swarm 42/42 | Regime BULL | VIX 14.2
Each KPI card should have: value, trend arrow, mini sparkline, and a small dropdown gear icon for threshold/alert settings.

ROW 2 - EQUITY CURVE (full width, compact):

- Strategy vs SPY benchmark, drawdown shading below
- CONTROLS: Time range buttons (1D/1W/1M/3M/1Y/ALL), Benchmark dropdown (SPY/QQQ/IWM), Overlay toggles (Drawdown, Signals, Regime bands), Export button
- Stats overlay: Alpha +4.5%, Beta 1.12, Max DD -4.2%, Sortino 3.21, Calmar 2.8

ROW 3 - THE MONEY-MAKING ROW (3 columns, DENSE):

LEFT COLUMN: TRADE IDEAS \& SIGNAL PIPELINE (this is the \#1 panel)

- Combined view: Each row IS a trade idea generated by agent consensus
- Columns: Symbol, Direction (LONG/SHORT), Confidence Score (color bar), Lead Agent, Swarm Agreement (e.g. 38/42 agents agree), SHAP Top Factor, Entry, Target, Stop, R-Multiple, Expected P\&L, Time Horizon, [Execute] [Modify] [Reject] buttons
- 12+ rows visible
- CONTROLS at top: Filter by (Confidence >70%, Direction, Sector, Agent), Sort dropdown, Auto-Execute toggle with threshold slider, Refresh rate dropdown (1s/5s/30s/manual)
- Each row expandable to show: all agent votes, SHAP waterfall, entry/exit logic

CENTER COLUMN: AGENT SWARM INTELLIGENCE (stacked panels)
Top: Agent Consensus Ring (BUY 62%/SELL 18%/HOLD 20%) with "STRONG BUY" center

- CONTROLS: Timeframe toggle (Intraday/Swing/Position), Weight by (Equal/Sharpe/Win Rate), Minimum confidence slider
Middle: Agent Competition Leaderboard
- Columns: Rank, Agent Name, Strategy Type, Sharpe, Win%, Signals Generated, P\&L Attribution, Accuracy (7d/30d/90d), Status (Active/Training/Paused)
- CONTROLS: Period dropdown, Sort by, Pause/Resume buttons per agent, "Spawn New Agent" button
Bottom: ML Model Health
- Feature importance bars, model drift indicator, last retrain timestamp, accuracy trend, data freshness gauge
- CONTROLS: Force Retrain button, Adjust features button, Model version dropdown

RIGHT COLUMN: POSITION \& RISK (stacked)
Top: Active Positions with live P\&L

- Ticker, Shares, Entry, Current, P\&L\$, P\&L%, R-Multiple, Holding Period, Agent Source, [Scale In] [Scale Out] [Close] buttons per row
- CONTROLS: Group by (Sector/Agent/Strategy), Show closed toggle, P\&L chart toggle
Bottom: Risk Intelligence Summary
- VaR (95%) gauge, Max Drawdown gauge, Portfolio Beta, Correlation to SPY
- Sector exposure horizontal bars with limit lines
- CONTROLS: Risk limit sliders (Max position size, Max sector weight, Max correlation, Stop loss %), Alert thresholds

ROW 4 - SUPPORTING INTELLIGENCE (3 columns, replacing order book):
LEFT: Sentiment \& News Intelligence

- Live feed: Source (Reuters/Bloomberg/Twitter/SEC), Headline, Sentiment (Bullish/Bearish/Neutral color), Impact Score, Affected Tickers
- CONTROLS: Filter by source, sentiment, sector. Alert on high-impact toggle
CENTER: Market Regime \& Breadth
- Current regime badge (BULL/BEAR/TRANSITION), Regime probability bars, A/D ratio, McClellan, Put/Call, %>200SMA, Sector rotation heatmap
- CONTROLS: Regime model dropdown, lookback period, alert on regime change toggle
RIGHT: EXPANDED Quick Actions \& System Controls
- Run Full Scan [F5], Spawn Agent Conference [N], Export Report [F7], EMERGENCY STOP [ESC]
- PLUS: Kill All Agents, Flatten All Positions, Pause All Trading, Adjust Global Risk Limits
- System resource bars: CPU, RAM, GPU, LLM tok/min, API latency
- Data source status indicators (Alpaca, Polygon, NewsAPI, SEC, Twitter - each with green/yellow/red dot)

FOOTER:

- News ticker with sentiment color coding
- System telemetry: WebSocket, API, 42 Agents, LLM 847 tok/min, Conf 8/12, CPU/RAM/GPU, Uptime

DESIGN: Dark theme, cyan accents, green=profit, red=loss. Every panel has controls. 10x the density of the previous version. This is a COMMAND CENTER not a dashboard.

Here is the definitive **Embodier.ai Intelligence Command Center** mockup, built specifically for the 1920x1080 resolution and reflecting your profit-first, ultra-dense philosophy.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### Key Structural Revisions Implemented:

1. **True System Navigation:** The left sidebar now accurately reflects your codebase architecture. It is grouped logically from `COMMAND` and `INTELLIGENCE` through `ML & ANALYSIS` down to `EXECUTION` and `SYSTEM`, ensuring the dashboard acts as the true root of the application.
2. **Actionable KPI Strip:** Every single metric in the top row (from Expected Value to the Kelly Optimal sizing) now features a trend sparkline and a dedicated gear icon for setting alerts or hard thresholds. You aren't just looking at the Win Rate (68.7%); you can immediately click to configure what happens if it drops below 60%.
3. **The Signal Pipeline (Row 3, Left):** The generic order book has been removed entirely in favor of an actionable Agent Signal Pipeline. This is the core money-maker. Every row represents a fully fleshed-out trade idea with Swarm Agreement (e.g., 38/42), a confidence color bar, the top SHAP factor driving the signal, and one-click execution controls `[Exec][Mod][Rej]`.
4. **Agent Accountability (Row 3, Center):** The swarm intelligence column now vertically stacks the Consensus Ring, the Agent Leaderboard, and ML Model Health. You can instantly see *which* agents are driving the consensus, their historical Sharpe, and if the underlying model is suffering from drift—complete with a "Force Retrain" capability.
5. **God-Mode Controls (Row 4, Right):** Because this is a trading command center, the bottom right quadrant is reserved for system-level overrides. Alongside the standard scan and spawn actions, you now have access to extreme interventions: **Kill All Agents**, **Flatten All Positions**, and the master **EMERGENCY STOP [ESC]**, monitored by live latency dots for Alpaca, Polygon, NewsAPI, and the SEC feeds.

Everything is wrapped in the \#0a0e17 deep slate theme with \#1e3a5f borders and the signature Embodier cyan (\#00d4ff) glow, heavily prioritizing green and red states to highlight exactly where edge is being gained or lost.
